typecheck.output: @facturin/api typecheck: Exited with code 0, @facturin/web typecheck: Exited with code 0

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the standard API port configuration (3100 for API, 3101 for web) and mandate use of environment variables for API URLs instead of hardcoded localhost ports. Multiple workers hardcoded port 3001 instead of 3100.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: web-login-page, web-tenant-list, web-tenant-creation-wizard, web-api-keys-management all had hardcoded 'http://localhost:3001' for API calls. services.yaml correctly defines port 3100.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the expected React Router v7 patterns and required routes for tenant CRUD operations (/tenants/:id, /tenants/:id/edit, /tenants/:id/configure). Workers are creating partial route sets.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: web-tenant-list ActionMenu used /tenants/:id and /tenants/:id/edit but only /tenants/:id/configure existed. The frontend skill doesn't specify required routes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that inline styles should not be used when Tailwind CSS is configured. Workers used inline style={{}} objects throughout components instead of Tailwind className.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: web-login-page, web-tenant-creation-wizard, web-dashboard-layout all use inline styles. Tailwind is configured but not consistently used.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify invocation syntax for agent-browser skill. Workers noted non-standard invocation method.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: web-setup-react-router reviewer noted agent-browser invocation syntax confusion in transcript.

fixFeatures.description: Fixed API port from 3001 to 3100 using VITE_API_URL environment variable
Added missing /tenants/:id and /tenants/:id/edit routes, and onClick handler for EmptyState button
Replaced mock TestConnection with real API call to /api/admin/tenants/:id/readiness
